title: Zustand chat store for managing messages, responses, and UI state
purpose: Manages chat message state, handles UI responses, and controls drawer visibility using Zustand state management.
module_context: Exports a Zustand store with message state, drawer open status, and unread count. Defines ChatMessage and CachedUIState interfaces for type safety.

steps.content: Check if a message with the same ID already exists in state.
IF the message already exists, do nothing and return current state.
IF the new message is blocking, cancel any existing unresponded blocking messages.
Prepend the new message to the message history and truncate to maximum 50 messages.
IF the new message is blocking, set it as the current blocking ID and open the drawer.
ELSE if the new message is not responded to, increment the unread count.
Find the message in state that matches the provided ID.
IF no matching message is found, return without performing any action.
Build a URL with project and session parameters from the message.
Submit the response to the backend API via a POST request.
IF the API call succeeds, mark the message as responded and update its response data.
IF the message was the current blocking message, clear the current blocking ID.
IF the API call fails, log the error and do not update the message state.
Find the message in state that matches the provided ID.
IF the message exists and has not been responded to or is blocking, decrement the unread count.
IF the message does not exist or has already been responded to or is blocking, do not change the unread count.
IF opening the drawer, count all non-blocking, non-responded messages as unread.
Set the unread count to zero when opening the drawer.
Update the drawer open state to the provided value.
Reset the messages array to an empty array.
Reset the unread count to zero.
Reset the current blocking ID to null.

methods.name: restoreUIFromCache
methods.normalized_params: (cachedUI: CachedUIState, project?: string, session?: string): void

steps.content: Check if a message with the same UI ID already exists in state.
IF an existing message is found, update its status and add project/session if missing.
ELSE create a new message from the cached UI data.
Prepend the new message to the message history.
IF the cached UI is blocking and pending, set it as the current blocking ID and open the drawer.
